description: Ideal for keeping your essentials handy, this puma foundation backpack is a durable construction packed with storage space. With a large main compartment and adjustable shoulder straps, it's an ideal backpack for school, work, travel or fitness. Length: 39 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 15 cm Made of 100% polyester for easy cleaning and longer life Has branded zippers for durability Two zippered compartments on the front with pouches inside Small zippered compartment near the haul loop with mesh panelling inside Two adjustable, padded shoulder straps for handling ease Adjustable, padded shoulder straps with brand tag appliqué d Padded base Fabric haul loop Brand tag appliqué d on the front Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
